info.title: TTS Bandmate API
info.description:
The TTS Bandmate Band API allows external integrations to read and manage bookings
and events for a band. Authentication uses a **Bearer token** issued per band.

## Authentication

All endpoints require an `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header. Tokens are
scoped to a single band and carry fine-grained permissions.

## Permissions

Each token is granted one or more permissions at issuance:

| Permission | Grants access to |
|---|---|
| `api:read-bookings` | GET /booked-dates, GET /bookings, GET /bookings/{id} |
| `api:write-bookings` | POST /bookings, PUT /bookings/{id}, PATCH /bookings/{id}, DELETE /bookings/{id} |
| `api:read-events` | GET /events |

## Date Filtering

`/booked-dates` and `/events` support the same set of query parameters for filtering
by date. All dates must be in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. Parameters can be combined
(e.g. `from` + `to` for a range).

get.description:
Returns bookings for the authenticated band with optional date filtering. Results are ordered by date ascending, then start time ascending.

**Required permission:** `api:read-bookings`

Returns all bookings for the authenticated band, ordered by date descending. Includes associated events, contacts, and payments.

**Required permission:** `api:read-bookings`

post.description:
Creates a new booking for the authenticated band. The end time is calculated automatically from `start_time` + `duration` (hours).

**Required permission:** `api:write-bookings`

duration.description: Duration in whole hours (1–24). Used to calculate end_time.

get.description:
Returns a single booking. Returns 404 if the booking does not exist or does not belong to the authenticated band.

**Required permission:** `api:read-bookings`

put.description:
Full update of an existing booking. Only fields provided are validated and updated.

**Required permission:** `api:write-bookings`

delete.description:
Permanently deletes a booking. This action cannot be undone.

**Required permission:** `api:write-bookings`

patch.description:
Partial update — send only the fields you want to change.

**Required permission:** `api:write-bookings`

get.description:
Returns events for the authenticated band from **both** bookings and legacy band events (polymorphic). Results are ordered by date ascending, then time ascending.

**Required permission:** `api:read-events`

AppliedFilters.description: Echoes back any date filters that were applied

eventable_type.description: Whether this event originates from a booking or a legacy band event

eventable_id.description: ID of the parent booking or band event

end_time.description: HH:MM 24-hour format (update only; ignored on create)

message.example: This API token does not have permission to perform this action
Booking not found or does not belong to your band

BearerToken.description: Band API token issued from the TTS dashboard

tags.name: Bookings
tags.description: Create and manage bookings for your band

tags.name: Booked Dates
tags.description: Query booking schedules with flexible date filters

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Read calendar events (bookings + legacy band events)
